yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Google_fixes_Chrome_zeroday_with_inthewi {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Google fixes Chrome zero-day with in-the-wild exploit (CVE-2026-5281)"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-01"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-5281" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Google fixes Chrome zero-day with in-the-wild exploit (CVE-2"; content:"CVE-2026-5281"; nocase; sid:9690188; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-22767 - Dell AppSync Symlink Following Information "; content:"CVE-2026-22767"; nocase; sid:5276078; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-22768 - Dell AppSync Privilege Escalation Vulnerabi"; content:"CVE-2026-22768"; nocase; sid:8922176; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-5256 - code-projects Simple Laundry System Paramete"; content:"CVE-2026-5256"; nocase; sid:4929027; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
